metadata.name: Respond to a Negative Product Review

description: A customer has left a 1-star review for a product on the website. A customer service agent needs to respond.

nodes.task_description: Receive a notification about a new low-rated product review.

expected_outcome.value: The agent is alerted to the negative feedback.

nodes.task_description: Review the customer's comment to understand the issue.

expected_outcome.value: The agent understands the reason for the customer's dissatisfaction.

nodes.task_description: Post a public reply to the review, apologizing for the issue and providing contact information for customer service to resolve the problem directly.

expected_outcome.value: A helpful and empathetic response is posted, showing other customers that the company addresses issues.
